data.comment: My favorite web3 street artist! Great friend too!
data.metadata: {"description":""}

translation.translatedContent: My favorite web3 street artist! Great friend too!

data.metadata: {"description":"Pavil has relentless conviction in the things he does. Whether IRL or online, he puts his best effort and pushes to have a good impact on his surroundings. Amazing friend!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil has relentless conviction in the things he does. Whether IRL or online, he puts his best effort and pushes to have a good impact on his surroundings. Amazing friend!

data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

data.metadata: {"description":"Guys, show my even one person who can't say that Berko isn't GOAT. Absolutely legendary person: supportive, friendly, positive, honest. Discord beast too he he he. Brooo, yea, i can call you bro, hope that in 2026 we are going to meet each other on any IRL event. Hugs and shake your hand."}

{"description":"Previously i left positive review to Kang and a bit later made decision about vouch to him. 

Kang super helpful and hardworking person, which is spreading word about Abstract in his region. Their local community (Korean) growing up because of such persons. 

He is spreading word about all updates, alphas, features, trying to onboard new users, IRL events. 

And yea, he is a Pudgy! Happy to vouch for you mate! Happy to connect with you."}

data.comment: Pavil, the Pudgy Artist of the Streets
data.metadata:
{"description":"I first got to know Pavil at Pudgy Asia. With 8,888 Pudgy Penguins out there, it’s not always easy for us to know everyone!

However, i recognized him instantly because i had seen so much of his spray painted wall art before. he is truly like a modern day bard. he brightens up the streets by filling ordinary walls with murals of Igloo, Abstract, Pudgy, and more.

I believe the secret behind his vibrant art lies in his physical health. Pavil constantly trains with triathlons to maintain a healthy body. socrates’ famous quote, "sound mind in a sound body", describes him perfectly.

By the way, why can’t I attach photos on the Ethos project? You really need to see the Bearish, Fugz, Abstrer, and Pudgy drawings he painstakingly created stroke by stroke

My personal wish is that he visits Korea someday to paint a mural here. He is an artist friend I really look forward to getting to know better!

Love you, Pudgy Fam Pavil!"}

translation.translatedContent: Pavil, the Pudgy Artist of the Streets
translation.translatedDescription:
I first got to know Pavil at Pudgy Asia. With 8,888 Pudgy Penguins out there, it’s not always easy for us to know everyone!

However, i recognized him instantly because i had seen so much of his spray painted wall art before. he is truly like a modern day bard. he brightens up the streets by filling ordinary walls with murals of Igloo, Abstract, Pudgy, and more.

I believe the secret behind his vibrant art lies in his physical health. Pavil constantly trains with triathlons to maintain a healthy body. socrates’ famous quote, "sound mind in a sound body", describes him perfectly.

By the way, why can’t I attach photos on the Ethos project? You really need to see the Bearish, Fugz, Abstrer, and Pudgy drawings he painstakingly created stroke by stroke

My personal wish is that he visits Korea someday to paint a mural here. He is an artist friend I really look forward to getting to know better!

Love you, Pudgy Fam Pavil!

data.metadata: {"description":"It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)"}

translation.translatedDescription: It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)

data.comment: Day 1 supporter and believer on Abstract

translation.translatedContent: Day 1 supporter and believer on Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
Papasmooth is one of a very few who has been here with us since day 1 when abstract is only the concept transitioning from testnet to mainnet

I could personally say that he truly deserves gigachad where he continues to spread positive and supportive energy 

I wish you the best brother

data.metadata: {"description":"Très présent au sein du discord Abstract, également sur X, Marvin est une personne impliqué au sein d'Abstract. Il suit la majorité des actualités en rapport avec Abstract, utilises la majorité des dApps de l'ecosystème et participe à la vie de communauté. \n\nUn véritable Gigachad !"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Very present within the Abstract Discord, also on X, Marvin is a person involved within Abstract. He follows the majority of news related to Abstract, uses the majority of the ecosystem's dApps, and participates in community life.

A true Gigachad!

data.metadata: {"description":"Je le vois partout, en plus d'être un Gigachad sur Abstract, il est très engagé au sein de la communauté crypto dans son ensemble. Il est très impliqué également au sein du Smol Talk, qui est un Space journalier Français, qui traite de divers sujets d'actualités crypto."}

translation.translatedDescription: I see him everywhere, in addition to being a Gigachad on Abstract, he is very engaged within the crypto community as a whole. He is also very involved in Smol Talk, which is a daily French Space that deals with various crypto news topics.

data.comment: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem

translation.translatedContent: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem
translation.translatedDescription:
Aliru is very present within the Abstract ecosystem, he is an active Gigachad, often there to help the community.

He brings his touch of freshness and originality.

I appreciate him for his authenticity.

data.metadata: {"description":"Silly est un gigachad d'abstract trés apprécié de la communauté.\nPour ma part j'apprecie son support constant, il n'hesite jamais à laisser un mot sympa et ses feedbacks sont toujours trés pertinents.\nJ'aime beaucoup les recap d'informations qu'il fait sur Abstract, cela nous permet à tous de ne pas louper les essentiels de la semaine."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Silly is a gigachad of Abstract who is highly appreciated by the community.
Personally, I appreciate his constant support, he never hesitates to leave a nice word, and his feedback is always very relevant.
I really like the information recaps he does on Abstract, it allows all of us not to miss the essentials of the week.

data.comment: Le travailleur de l'ombre par exemple
data.metadata: {"description":"Guzeito est un énorme bosseur, il a developpé des applis trés intéressante qui aujourd'hui nous permettent de gagner du temps , il mérite beaucoup de reconnaissance et il devrait etre davantage connu pour  sa valeur.\nJe le vouch également pour son aide sur le fonctionnement d'Ethos au démarrage , il m'a accompagné et m'a expliqué le fonctionnement comme un mentor"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Guzeito is a huge workaholic, he has developed very interesting apps that today allow us to save time, he deserves a lot of recognition and he should be better known for his value.
I also vouch for his help on the operation of Ethos at the start, he accompanied me and explained how it works like a mentor

data.comment: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea

translation.translatedContent: The Gigachad of Abstract in Korea
translation.translatedDescription:
KangBokSoon is the legend in the Korean Gigachad community. He is always on top, taking care of the Abstract Korea community in the Telegram chat and with content on X.

I also had a chance to meet him in Korea during KBW. SUPER NICE GUY.

KangBokSoon has super good energy that people want to be around!

data.comment: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
data.metadata:
{"description":"Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract."}

translation.translatedContent: Nat Head of the Abstract Thailand Chapter & Guardian of the Community
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat is both a devoted father and the Giga Chad of Abstract in Thailand. On Discord, he takes on the role of community moderator always present, always dependable.

He has global impact for sure, but his main mission is focused on educating and growing the Abstract ecosystem within Thailand. He’s a true builder, introducing new people to Abstract every day and making the community feel like home.

Sometimes he jokingly calls me “Oppa” yes, the Korean word just for fun in English. It always catches me off guard and makes everyone laugh.

He frequently hosts Spaces where he and other community members explore everything happening in Abstract. I often join just to listen and translate in Korean while learning from him.

I met him in person at KBW 2025, and we had a really nice conversation. He was there with Billy both of them are great friends and even better people.

We share the same sentiment at the end of the day

We love Abstract.

data.comment: Billy, the News Anchor of Abstract
data.metadata:
{"description":"Curious about what’s happening across the Abstract ecosystem? Turn on notifications for sillybilly on X he drops new updates every single week.

I’m deep diving into Abstract myself and having a great time, but even I miss things sometimes. That’s when this guy comes through with the updates I didn’t catch. Super grateful for him.

He stays on top of everything collaborations and events, project progress, K-pop & NFT crossovers, NFT & DeFi and so much more. The amount of info he consistently puts out is wild.

He even earned the rare Giga Chad role, which speaks for itself.

I met him in person during KBW, and I can say for sure he’s someone you can trust.

Also he is the one who invited me to Ethos platform. Thank you!

We love Abstract!"}

translation.translatedContent: Billy, the News Anchor of Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
Curious about what’s happening across the Abstract ecosystem? Turn on notifications for sillybilly on X he drops new updates every single week.

I’m deep diving into Abstract myself and having a great time, but even I miss things sometimes. That’s when this guy comes through with the updates I didn’t catch. Super grateful for him.

He stays on top of everything collaborations and events, project progress, K-pop & NFT crossovers, NFT & DeFi and so much more. The amount of info he consistently puts out is wild.

He even earned the rare Giga Chad role, which speaks for itself.

I met him in person during KBW, and I can say for sure he’s someone you can trust.

Also he is the one who invited me to Ethos platform. Thank you!

We love Abstract!

translation.translatedDescription: Giga Chad energy, reliable, friendly, and incredibly talented. Pavil is easily one of the brightest people in the Pudgy Penguins and Abstract community. I’m an absolute fan of his work, his street art is museum quality, just incredible stuff. LayerZero, Abstract NFTs, and PP are some of my favorite artworks, and seeing how he elevates these spaces is inspiring. A true gem to any community. Big brother penguin. Massive respect, can’t wait for the next art drop.

data.author: 0x8D72e3D90f4B6A0708Ae5a95eAeB778f3b1e3117
data.subject: 0x607d2381aFecbD80c4AD5CCE8059205C2a297966
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "I’ve known Silly Billy as a true gigachad from Abstract, deeply invested and incredibly skilled in his content creation.
He’s got that rare mix of creativity, consistency, and community spirit that makes a real difference.
Always active, always pushing ideas forward, he manages to blend humor, insight, and passion for the ecosystem perfectly.
In every interaction, you can feel his dedication ,not just to his own growth, but to helping Abstract shine.
Silly Billy is one of those pillars who remind us why we believe in this space."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I’ve known Silly Billy as a true gigachad from Abstract, deeply invested and incredibly skilled in his content creation.
He’s got that rare mix of creativity, consistency, and community spirit that makes a real difference.
Always active, always pushing ideas forward, he manages to blend humor, insight, and passion for the ecosystem perfectly.
In every interaction, you can feel his dedication ,not just to his own growth, but to helping Abstract shine.
Silly Billy is one of those pillars who remind us why we believe in this space.

data.author: 0xdd9418830De1369F2ad0d8A9CAa98997675c07b4
data.subject: 0x607d2381aFecbD80c4AD5CCE8059205C2a297966
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "I first met sillybilly at Abstract, and he is truly a remarkable person.
He consistently shares high-quality insights about Abstract and its ecosystem, always adding real value to the community.
He is also very supportive in the Abstract Discord, always helping members and contributing with a positive spirit.

Thank you for all your dedication and positivity.
I hope to have the chance to meet you in real life one day to exchange ideas and learn from your experience."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I first met sillybilly at Abstract, and he is truly a remarkable person.
He consistently shares high-quality insights about Abstract and its ecosystem, always adding real value to the community.
He is also very supportive in the Abstract Discord, always helping members and contributing with a positive spirit.

Thank you for all your dedication and positivity.
I hope to have the chance to meet you in real life one day to exchange ideas and learn from your experience.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xb0bf6F6Fd3C8bD194d94d39a41FcB99FdFfb5273
data.metadata: {"description":"I’ve been following NatChittamai for a while now, and as one of the first GIGACHADS within the Abstract ecosystem, he consistently brings huge value to the table. He doesn’t just talk about the protocol, he lives it, showcasing Abstract in real‑world events and making the project tangible beyond the screen. On his profile you’ll find well‑thought posts, event highlights, and evidence of a strong community mindset.\n\nHe’s always diving into meaningful discussions, lending a hand when needed, and pushing for long‑term growth rather than short‑term hype. For anyone serious about Abstract and its future, NatChittamai stands out as a trustworthy, committed figure who’s helping build something solid."}

translation.translatedDescription:
I’ve been following NatChittamai for a while now, and as one of the first GIGACHADS within the Abstract ecosystem, he consistently brings huge value to the table. He doesn’t just talk about the protocol, he lives it, showcasing Abstract in real‑world events and making the project tangible beyond the screen. On his profile you’ll find well‑thought posts, event highlights, and evidence of a strong community mindset.

He’s always diving into meaningful discussions, lending a hand when needed, and pushing for long‑term growth rather than short‑term hype. For anyone serious about Abstract and its future, NatChittamai stands out as a trustworthy, committed figure who’s helping build something solid.
